Phase 28h: Recommendation Correctness — 6 Invarianz-Tests fuer Channel, Roaming, Uplink

Drei gemeldete Bug-Pattern durch Tests verifiziert — alle Guards korrekt:
- T1a/T1b: Channel-Duplikat-Invariante (B1-Dedup, unique targets, max 3)
- T2a/T2b: Roaming scoreAfter >= scoreBefore (changePercent >= 0 + A1-Guard)
- T3a/T3b: Uplink-Gating (>10% Benefit bei ratio > 0.60, Zone-Level 50%)

commit.message:
fix: setup CLI uses node direct invocation instead of .cmd/.sh wrappers

Paths with spaces (e.g., "Claudex v2") break when the shell splits the
unquoted command. Using node "path/to/dist/hook.mjs" works cross-platform
and avoids the issue entirely.

commit.message:
CRITICAL: Fix device address lookup - 0x vs 0X case mismatch

The get_device_by_address() method called .upper() on the address
before checking startswith("0x"), turning "0x" into "0X". This caused
the prefix check to fail, resulting in a double-prefix "0x0X..." and
no device match. All incoming telegrams showed "Unknown device".

Fix: Strip 0x/0X prefix entirely and compare raw hex digits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: strip overclaiming — align docs with actual implementation

Six areas where docs described behaviour that isn't wired at runtime:

1. Estimator approval gate → auto-rejection
   The controller calls MarkFailed (auto-reject), not an approval hold.
   Docs said tasks were "blocked until a human approves". Fixed in
   estimator.md and README.md.

2. Task-scoped secrets
   secretresolver is not wired into ProcessTicket; agentSecretKeyRefs()
   only merges SCM + Slack credentials. Downgraded the README claim and
   configuration.md description accordingly.

3. Guardrail layers 3 & 4 (guardrails.md injection, task profiles)
   The promptbuilder is not called from the controller execution path.
   Per-task-type file pattern restrictions are not enforced. Added
   "Not yet wired" / "Config schema only" admonitions with the real state.
   Simplified the mermaid diagram to the four layers that actually run.

4. Leader election and multi-tenancy
   No leader election implementation exists in main.go or controller.go.
   TenancyConfig has no runtime effect. Both marked as planned/roadmap
   in index.md, scaling.md, and configuration.md.

5. "Secure by default"
   sandbox.enabled and networkPolicy.enabled both default to false in
   values.yaml. Changed "Secure by default" to "Security-capable".

6. SDK stubs
   sdk/{python,typescript}/src/proto/ directories are empty; stubs must
   be generated with `make sdk-gen`. sdks.md and README.md updated to
   describe what IS in the repo vs what must be generated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix TGN training instability: normalize time deltas, reduce monotonicity weight

- Time deltas normalized to days (÷86400) — raw Unix timestamps (~1.6B seconds)
  caused TimeEncoding to produce noise on first forward pass
- Monotonicity weight reduced 0.5→0.1 to stop collapsing short-horizon predictions
- Vectorized neighbor feature gathering (replaced Python for-loops)

commit.message:
Add explicit Hebrew anti-patterns to prevent translated-sounding output

Gemini was producing literal translations like "גלבוע הוא לא-טיסה"
instead of natural Hebrew "אי אפשר לטוס בגלבוע". Added ❌/✅ examples
and rules against unnecessary pronouns, formal vocabulary, and complex
sentence structures.

feat: implement org-workspace v0.3.0 — full org-mode library for AI workflows

Complete implementation across all 10 phases:
- Phase 0: orgparse PR #77 compat layer, multiline properties, StateConfig
- Phase 1: NodeView stateless read-only view with staleness detection
- Phase 2: Auto-ID generation and cross-file ID resolution index
- Phase 3: OrgWorkspace multi-file container with all mutations
- Phase 4: FileLock, OptimisticLock, TaskClaim concurrency primitives
- Phase 5: LOGBOOK line-level insertion and SessionLog
- Phase 6: Plans as DAGs with DEPENDS_ON, topological sort, cycle detection
- Phase 7: Query engine — agenda, deadlines, next-action, stale detection
- Phase 8: Archive operations per DIP-0009 with structural heading protection
- Phase 9: AI execution context assembly with engram hooks

205 tests, 94% coverage, 0 lint errors.

Fix navigate_viewer 100% failure on claude.ai (v0.19 regression)

Primary: remove .slice(0, 8) on viewUUID in get_artwork_image text
channel — LLM was using the truncated 8-char UUID for navigate_viewer
calls, which never matched the full UUID in the viewerQueues Map.
Regression from b4e5af0 (compact text summaries). Fixes #62.

Secondary fixes:
- Add 3×100ms retry in navigate_viewer for concurrent-POST race condition
- Increase IIIF clamping safety margin from -1 to -3 pixels
- Detect isError on structured returns in withLogging

commit.message:
Fix: multi-stage build to compile sqlite3 on DHI n8n image

n8nio/n8n uses Docker Hardened Images (DHI) — Alpine without
a package manager (no apk, no apt-get). Cannot install build
tools directly in the N8N image.

Solution: multi-stage build
  Stage 1 (node:24-alpine): compile n8n-nodes-sqlite with full apk
  Stage 2 (n8nio/n8n): copy compiled node_modules to /n8n-custom-nodes

Add N8N_CUSTOM_EXTENSIONS=/n8n-custom-nodes so N8N loads the
pre-compiled SQLite node from that directory at startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Supabase 미연결 시에도 대시보드 정상 동작하도록 바이패스 처리

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor ParseError from struct to enum ParseError<E> (#9)

* Refactor ParseError from struct to enum ParseError<E>

Separate syntax errors from action errors at the type level.
ParseError is now an enum with Syntax { terminal } and Action(E)
variants, with default type parameter E = Infallible. This removes
the From<ParseError> bound on Types::Error — users with infallible
actions simply use type Error = Infallible instead of the misleading
type Error = ParseError.

- Generated push/finish return ParseError<A::Error>
- format_error takes terminal: SymbolId directly
- Remove terminal() method; use irrefutable let patterns instead
- Remove bootstrap gate on meta module
- Remove bootstrap_regex feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ErrorType trait, remove Error from AstNode

Move the error type from AstNode (a data trait) to a new ErrorType
supertrait of Action, so users impl ErrorType once and use Self::Error
in all Action::build return types. The generated Types trait now has
ErrorType as a supertrait instead of its own type Error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Run cargo fmt to fix CI formatting check

commit.message:
Improve VM IP detection via ARP table matching

When guest agent is unavailable, read /proc/net/arp on the host,
fetch each VM's MAC from its Proxmox config, and match to get IP.
Priority: guest agent -> ipconfig0 (cloud-init) -> ARP MAC match.

commit.message:
Fix wandb history table blank: remove explicit step= parameter

The step= parameter in wandb_run.log() conflicted with define_metric
custom step_metric, causing run.history to appear empty. Removed all
step=_individual_idx calls; wandb auto-manages global step while
define_metric handles per-metric x-axes (generation, individual_idx).

using SetPath + GetPropertyList on the map cacher. Client confirms role on
login and stores ownerRole in game-store.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Apply Hebrew Masoretic theological corrections to Samoan glosses

Update EXTENDED_VOCAB with Hebrew-accurate theological glosses:
- agalelei: 'treated well' → 'kindness' (Hebrew chesed = lovingkindness)
- faatuatua: 'faith' → 'faith/trust' (Hebrew batach = trust)
- malumalu: 'temple' → 'temple/sanctuary' (Hebrew heykal/mishkan)
- Add sauniga, masani, tofiga for Hebrew mishpat (judgment/ordinance)
- Add theological vocabulary: palapala, toto (blood), mutimutivale
  (compassion), mama (clean/pure), etc.
- Add WHOLE_PHRASES for Hebrew theological compounds (le alofa
  mutimutivale, le agaga o Ieova, le mamalu o Ieova, etc.)
- Fix Genesis 12:16 agalelei override to 'he showed kindness'

Improve mistranslation checker (hebrew_cross_ref_v2.py):
- Add 30+ Samoan→English theological mappings (agalelei→mercy,
  sauniga→ordinance, liliu→return, loto→soul, fetafai→tabernacle, etc.)
- Merge temple/tabernacle synonym groups (Samoan uses malumalu for both)
- Expand synonym groups with morphological forms (wickedly, feared, etc.)
- Handle negated Hebrew glosses (without-righteousness ≠ reversal)
- Add adverb/verb forms to synonym groups to catch natural co-occurrences
- Document known Psalms verse-numbering offset limitation

Results: 1,882 → 1,433 findings (24% reduction in false positives)
- shuv (repent): 101 → 14 (-86% from foi/liliu/faafoi mappings)
- mishkan (tabernacle): 88 → 0 (-100% from temple/tabernacle merge)
- nephesh (soul): 352 → 281 (-20% from loto→soul mapping)
- ruach (spirit): 225 → 154 (-32% from manava→spirit mapping)
- chesed (mercy): 59 → 45 (-24% from agalelei→mercy mapping)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
